2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch renames the function sunrpc_cache_pipe_upcall_timeout() to sunrpc_cache_upcall_warn(). The original function name was misleading as it did not actually handle timeouts, but instead warned if there were no listeners. This change clarifies the purpose of the function and makes its name more descriptive. The rename affects 6 files in total, with 9 insertions and 9 deletions across these files.
